other_findings.finding: Dc formation accompanied by invagination of the placode
Dc expressed FAM3C and EFNB1, predicted to interact with placode cells
Dc-placode interactions conserved between prenatal skin and SkO

evidence_quotes.quote: The Dc, for which formation is accompanied by invagination of the placode, expressed FAM3C and EFNB1, which were, respectively, predicted to interact with LAMP1 or CXADR and EPHB6 on the placode
the highlighted interactions were conserved between the mesenchymal and epithelial cells of the SkO model for corresponding stages during HF formation
